"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Improper escaping of a textarea custom field's contents in the Update Issue page (bug_update_page.php) allows an attacker to inject HTML and, if CSP settings permit, execute arbitrary JavaScript when the page is loaded.

### Impact
Session theft leading to admin account takeover, full project data access.

- Precondition: A textarea-type custom field must be configured for the project
- Attacker: Authenticated user with bug report permission (low privilege)
- Victim: Any user viewing the bug edit form, including administrators

### Patches
- 5fec0f448b7a7d7d539a6adb6dccceac4e4e4ab7

### Workarounds
The default Content-Security Policy will block script execution.

### References
- https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37003
- This is related to [CVE-2024-34081](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wgx7-jp56-65mq).

### Credits
Thanks to the following security researchers for independently discovering and responsibly reporting the issue, and providing a patch to fix it.
- Thanks to Nozomu Sasaki (Paul) (@morimori-dev)
- Tristan Madani (@TristanInSec) from Talence Security", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0023, "percentile": 0.13552}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:34:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-39960"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-20T22:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:34:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/5fec0f448b7a7d7d539a6adb6dccceac4e4e4ab7", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37003", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39960", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Custom Field Textarea Values", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T20:14:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj6w-v29q-4rgx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Custom Field Textarea Values
